title: All The Ores
description: Adds Recipes to craft all Vanilla Minecraft Ores
body:
## AllTheOres

**AllTheOres** is a lightweight Minecraft mod/datapack.

Instead of relying purely on mining and world generation luck, AllTheOres gives you alternative ways to obtain ores like **Coal, Iron, Gold, Redstone, Lapis, Diamond, and Emerald**, while still keeping the vanilla feel intact.

### ✨ Features
- Craftable versions of **all vanilla ores**

### 🎮 Vanilla-Friendly
AllTheOres is designed to feel like it could have been part of vanilla Minecraft—no overpowered shortcuts, just smart progression and new possibilities.

**Made with [MCreator](https://mcreator.net/)**
